headline: Virginia Rep. Robert Wittman Sold Over $1K Worth of Crown Castle Stock: Here’s What You Should Know
summary: A July filing shows that Representative Robert Wittman reported a sale in Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI), valued between $1,001 and $15,000. The transaction date is listed as June 30, 2026, with the report published on July

headline: Why I Don't Buy REIT CEFs
summary: High-yield REIT CEFs often carry hidden risks that investors overlook. Learn why a selective REIT portfolio may perform better.
